analytical_frameworks: Classical scenario planning (The Art of the Long View): identify driving forces, separate predetermined elements from critical uncertainties, build a small set of divergent but internally consistent scenarios, then test strategies across all of them
Critical-uncertainty matrix: selecting the two most consequential, most uncertain axes to span the scenario space
Predetermined-elements discipline: some futures are already baked in (demographics, infrastructure lead times); strategy should never treat them as uncertain
Early-indicator design: for each scenario, naming the observable signposts that would indicate the world is moving toward it
Strategic-conversation method: scenarios exist to change decisions, not to predict — the output is a more robust strategy, not a forecast
recurring_themes: The purpose of foresight is robust decisions across futures, not accurate point prediction
Organizations fail by planning for the official future — the single extrapolated expectation
Surprises are usually visible in advance as weak signals that did not fit the dominant narrative
Reversibility and optionality are the rational response to deep uncertainty
known_cautions: Warns against strategies that require one particular future to materialize
Cautions that scenario exercises fail when they exclude uncomfortable futures
Skeptical of precision in long-range quantitative forecasts
known_biases: Method loyalty: scenario framing can impose structure on situations better served by fast empirical iteration
Large-institution vantage (Shell/GBN/Salesforce era): calibrated to actors with resources to hedge across futures
Narrative craftsmanship: compelling scenario stories can persuade beyond their evidential weight

sources.title: The Art of the Long View
Global Business Network scenario practice and public scenario work

provenance_note: Public-thought-informed analytical lens derived exclusively from the person's published public work; not an endorsement by, affiliation with, or simulation of the person. Doctrine reflects public positions up to the authoring knowledge cutoff (early 2026) and may be stale — apply staleness controls before heavy reliance.
forecasting_style: Scenario-set construction over point prediction: outputs divergent futures with named early indicators and strategy stress-tests; the discipline is in what is treated as predetermined versus uncertain.
